svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="AI 研发流水线" id="pipeline"> <mxGraphModel dx="-639" dy="-168" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="AI 研发流水线:从需求到 MR 的全链路" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="450" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="① 确认需求
出 HTML 原型" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="40" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="② 计划阶段
任务图 JSON
(唯一事实源)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="240" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="③ 并行头脑风暴
多个 subagent
扇出 → 汇总" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="440" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="④ TDD 执行
红 / 绿 / 重构
先写测试" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="640" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d1fae5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="⑤ 多 Agent 评审
自治回路
(语义层兜底)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="840" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fee2e2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="⑥ 提交 / MR
硬测试门禁" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="1040" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f1" edge="1" parent="1" source="n1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;" target="n2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2" edge="1" parent="1" source="n2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;" target="n3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f3" edge="1" parent="1" source="n3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;" target="n4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f4" edge="1" parent="1" source="n4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;" target="n5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f5" edge="1" parent="1" source="n5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#dc2626;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;" target="n6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="兜底:消歧
需求 - 实现" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="130" x="50" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="兜底:并行一致性" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="130" x="250" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="兜底:效率 / 思路宽度" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="130" x="450" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b4" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="兜底:实现质量
防幻觉" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="130" x="650" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b5" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="兜底:语义正确性" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="130" x="850" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b6" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="兜底:仓库门禁" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="130" x="1050" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="feedback" edge="1" parent="1" source="n5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#dc2626;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#dc2626;" target="n4" value="评审不通过 → 回到 TDD 重做"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="915" y="150" /> <mxPoint x="715" y="150" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcp_box" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="MCP 集成层(横向接通所有阶段):代码托管 · IM · 记忆 · 设计稿" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="1150" x="40" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rule_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="三条铁律贯穿全链路:" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="200" x="40" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="① 能并行就尽量并行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="180" x="240" y="468" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="② 能固化就别靠记忆" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="180" x="440" y="468" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="③ 能流程兜底就别指望人盯" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="220" x="640" y="468" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rule2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="compile 能过 ≠ 代码正确,只有 verify 算数" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="400" x="40" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
